repos.rationale: Primary repo for this run. Research ticket — output artifacts (pitch deck information package) are written here. No code changes needed; this repo hosts the research deliverable.
Core product backend — primary evidence source for product capabilities (9-step pipeline, 80+ APIs, deployment automation, inspection API, NS integration). No code changes needed.
Web application frontend — evidence source for user-facing features (dashboard, kanban, deployment center, staging queue, analytics). No code changes needed.
Legacy/deprecated NS frontend — historical context only, showing NetSuite-first product evolution. No code changes needed.
Legacy/deprecated NS backend — historical context only, showing original 6-step workflow before Helix Global integration. No code changes needed.
Open-source NetSuite CLI tool (MIT) — evidence of OSS strategy and NS integration foundation. Created by team member Luis Simosa. No code changes needed.
